languages.text: "Не извольте беспокоиться. Этого капитана я давно знаю. У него под носом можно хоть мельта-бомбу пронести, он и не заметит". {n}Яруб отмахивается с деланной небрежностью.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Яруб отмахивается, говорит, что этого он на раз два обведет вокруг пальца, мы можем не переживать.

languages.text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Не извольте беспокоиться. Этого капитана я давно знаю. У него под носом можно хоть мельта-бомбу пронести, он и не заметит". {n}Яруб отмахивается с деланной небрежностью.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

"Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

"Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

languages.text: «No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Conozco al capitán desde hace mucho. Podría colar una bomba de fusión delante de sus narices y no sospecharía nada». {n}Jarub te tranquiliza con indiferencia fingida.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Conozco al capitán desde hace mucho. Podría colar una bomba de fusión delante de sus narices y no sospecharía nada». {n}Jarub te tranquiliza con indiferencia fingida.{/n}

languages.text: “别担心，大人。我认识上尉很久了。就算在他鼻子底下偷偷塞颗热熔炸弹，他都不会发现。”{n}雅鲁布漫不经心地挥挥手，不把你的警告当回事。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “别担心，大人。我认识上尉很久了。就算在他鼻子底下偷偷塞颗热熔炸弹，他都不会发现。”{n}雅鲁布漫不经心地挥挥手，不把你的警告当回事。{/n}

languages.text: « Rassurez-vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Depuis le temps, je connais le capitaine comme si je l'avais fait. On pourrait poser une bombe à fusion sous son nez qu'il se rendrait compte de rien. » {n}Jarub balaie votre mise en garde d'un ton empreint d'une insouciance feinte.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Rassurez-vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Depuis le temps, je connais le capitaine comme si je l'avais fait. On pourrait poser une bombe à fusion sous son nez qu'il se rendrait compte de rien. » {n}Jarub balaie votre mise en garde d'un ton empreint d'une insouciance feinte.{/n}

languages.text: "Hiç merak etmeyin {mf|lordum|leydim}. Yüzbaşı ile uzun zamandır tanışız. Dibinde bir melta bombası patlatsanız bile ruhu duymaz." {n}Jarub, uyarını sahte bir umursamazlıkla savuşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hiç merak etmeyin {mf|lordum|leydim}. Yüzbaşı ile uzun zamandır tanışız. Dibinde bir melta bombası patlatsanız bile ruhu duymaz." {n}Jarub, uyarını sahte bir umursamazlıkla savuşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Keine Sorge, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Ich kenne den Captain schon lange. Er würde es nicht mal merken, wenn Ihr vor seiner Nase eine Melterbombe verkauft." {n}Jarub schlägt deine Warnung mit gespielter Sorglosigkeit in den Wind.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Keine Sorge, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Ich kenne den Captain schon lange. Er würde es nicht mal merken, wenn Ihr vor seiner Nase eine Melterbombe verkauft." {n}Jarub schlägt deine Warnung mit gespielter Sorglosigkeit in den Wind.{/n}

languages.text: 「心配はいりません、{mf|殿|殿}。私はこの船長と長い間知り合いです。彼の鼻の下に溶鉱弾を仕掛けても、彼は気づかないでしょう。」{n}ジャラブは、あなたの警告を、わざと気楽に流す.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}. I've known the captain a long time. You could sneak a melta bomb right under his nose and he'd be none the wiser." {n}Jarub waves off your warning with feigned insouciance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「心配はいりません、{mf|殿|殿}。私はこの船長と長い間知り合いです。彼の鼻の下に溶鉱弾を仕掛けても、彼は気づかないでしょう。」{n}ジャラブは、あなたの警告を、わざと気楽に流す.{/n}
